历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 2548 → 2571 → 2334 → 1972 → 2228, showing a fluctuating forward trend overall. In 2024, it surged to 1972, then retreated to 2228 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 256 positions over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 2228. The university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for Physics Category was 121 in 2021, 122 in 2022, 122 in 2023, 123 in 2024, 125 in 2025, and 122 in 2026, a reduction of 3 students (-2.4%) compared to 2025. The reduction slightly eases competition, and the ranking number tends to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking 2026 approximately 33rd, with recent rankings stable in the 28–33 range, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (2 incidents: dispute over hardship identification processing, associate professor's moral misconduct). Douyin popularity ranking 33rd (relatively hot), with 27 videos, comprehensive popularity of 1.34 million, and medium-high exposure. In 2022, there was a signal of admission gap but it was neutral. Overall reputation has a slight inhibitory effect on application psychology. Electronic Science and Technology A+, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, highly matching the university's core enrollment majors such as Electronic Information and Computer Science, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication was highly recommended in 2024, Computer Science recommended (67.8), Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended (74.28), all core major directions of the university, with sustained high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 379,600 in 2025. Physics Category is estimated at about 264,600, an increase of about 1.6% from 260,400 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan (Southwest region), geographically close to Guangxi, both in the Southwest, with positive regional preference. The university's enrollment in Guangxi accounts for about 2.2% of the total national enrollment (2025), at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2228, a reduction of 3 students in 2026 (ranking number tends to increase), an increase of about 1.6% in Guangxi Physics Category candidates (competition intensifies), slightly negative reputation (slight inhibitory effect), and sustained high popularity of Electronic Information/Computer Science majors (competition intensifies), multiple factors combined are expected to result in a slight forward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2181, with a range of 1854–2508.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, a top national science and engineering university, but liberal arts are not its strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly involves science and engineering-related incidents, with limited psychological impact on liberal arts applicants. Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), overall exposure moderate. Its A+ disciplines (Electronic Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering) are all engineering, while liberal arts majors (Foreign Languages and Literature, Social Science Experimental Class) have no corresponding A-class discipline evaluations, making disciplinary appeal average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The admission rankings for medical programs (only nursing) at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Guangxi have fluctuated significantly over the past five years. In 2021, the medical category included clinical medicine and nursing, with a total enrollment of 16 students and a minimum ranking of 28438. No medical enrollment data was available for 2022. From 2023 onward, only nursing was offered, with enrollment reduced to 4 students and ranking jumping to 16122. In 2024, the ranking continued to rise slightly to 15823. In 2025, the ranking fell back to 17582, with enrollment remaining at 4 students. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan remains at 4 students, unchanged from 2025, but the nursing program has been upgraded to an 'AI Cross-disciplinary Innovation Talent Training Experimental Class,' significantly enhancing the program's content.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national '985 Project' and '211 Project' key construction universities, and selected as a national 'Double First-Class' construction university (Category A). The university focuses on electronic information science and technology, with outstanding engineering strength. In recent years, it has continuously expanded into the intersection of medicine and artificial intelligence. The medical programs are based on the Shahe Campus, sharing the university's high-quality engineering resources.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs are highly popular among Guangxi candidates. Although nursing is not as popular as clinical medicine, the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China combines it with AI cross-disciplinary innovation to create a differentiated training direction, enhancing the program's appeal. The medical enrollment scale in Guangxi is extremely small (only 4 students), making rankings sensitive to changes in applicant numbers. In 2026, the program has been upgraded to an AI experimental class, which is expected to attract more high-scoring candidates, slightly increasing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and recent ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for medical programs at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Guangxi in 2026 is approximately 17382, a slight increase of about 200 positions compared to 2025 (17582). The ranking increase is mainly due to the upgrade of nursing to an AI cross-disciplinary innovation experimental class, enhancing the program's appeal. The expected admission ranking range is between 17034 and 17730.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Nursing (Shahe Campus) (AI Cross-disciplinary Innovation Talent Training Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China will only offer one medical program in Guangxi: Nursing (AI Cross-disciplinary Innovation Talent Training Experimental Class), with an enrollment of 4 students. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (17034-17730) are encouraged to actively apply, and it is recommended to list this program as the sole choice.
